case_title: LEUNG, KAM et al vs. MANLEY JR., KENNETH A. et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, KAM LEUNG, GEE NG, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT MANLEY JR., KENNETH A. DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-05-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-03-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-15-1994
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-05-1994, CONTINUED TO AUG-19-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 SANCTIONS OF $50.00 STAYED UNTIL 8/19/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-19-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR NOV-17-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-17-1994, DISMISSAL PURS. CRC 525
MOTION TO SET ASIDE ORDER DISMISSING CASE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, KAM LEUNG, GEE NG, JASON HEARING SET FOR DEC-21-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO SET ASIDE ORDER DISMISSING CASE, CALENDAR OF DEC-21-1994, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE ORDER; STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN. 26, 1995.
SET FOR STATUS CONFERENCE HEARING SET FOR JAN-26-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 BY THE COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-26-1995, OFF CALENDAR
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
